title: Neon Rain City Crosswalk Editorial Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Neon Rain City Crosswalk Editorial Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic night street portrait of adult woman at a city crosswalk after light rain with wind-blown hair and warm natural smile after light rain, built around intimate smartphone-forward framing. Subject: adult woman at a city crosswalk after light rain with wind-blown hair and warm natural smile wears dark coat, smiles naturally, with wind-blown hair and holding a smartphone close to the camera in intimate wide-angle framing creating a close candid interaction with the viewer. Scene: wet reflective pavement, neon-lit buildings, soft bokeh city lights, passing-car light streaks, and faint pedestrian motion blur surrounds the subject with wet reflective pavement, neon-lit buildings, bokeh city lights, passing-car streaks, faint pedestrian motion blur, and urban night atmosphere. Composition: Fixed 4:5 close portrait with 24mm wide-angle slight fisheye distortion, camera very near the subject, smartphone close to lens, face behind it, and handheld candid framing. Signature Elements: Preserved neon rain city crosswalk editorial portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Cinematic urban nightlife portrait, romantic realism, 35mm film emulation, authentic grain, soft contrast, subtle halation, dreamy neon bloom, and professional editorial photography. Color Palette: Fixed teal and cyan neon blended with warm skin tones, lifted shadows, wet asphalt reflections, and restrained night-city color bloom. Lighting: Mixed neon signage in cyan/green plus warm highlights on the face, streetlight bounce from wet pavement, glowy signs, and soft motion blur in background only. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
